subject: fix(docs): update TutorialModal + CLAUDE.md for ThemeSelector
body:
TutorialModal.jsx line 182: "Click the sun/moon button" was stale after
ThemeSelector replaced the simple dark mode toggle. Updated to describe
the new theme selector dropdown.

CLAUDE.md line 556: useDarkMode.js description updated from "Dark mode
toggle" to "Dark mode + per-mode DaisyUI theme selection" to reflect
the hook's expanded responsibility.

Tags: docs, tutorial, theme
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
